Rekha
Koppoju

B.Tech Computer Science Engineering · Batch 2025

Reg No: 25BCE2272

Driven by curiosity — from charting constellations on rooftops to writing code that solves real problems. I believe the stars taught me to dream, and technology is how I build those dreams.

Direction

Career Objective

As a first-year Computer Science student at Vellore Institute of Technology, my goal is to harness the power of technology to craft solutions that are meaningful, intelligent, and people-centric. I aspire to blend my passion for design, astronomy, and problem-solving to build systems at the intersection of software engineering and human experience — contributing to a world where innovation is both beautiful and impactful. I seek opportunities that challenge me to grow as a developer, a thinker, and a changemaker.

Building

Projects

🛠 Multidisciplinary Project · VIT
Smart Study Planner

A web-based Smart Study Planner designed to help students organise their academic schedule intelligently. Built as part of VIT's Multidisciplinary Project curriculum, this platform integrates time management, topic tracking, and goal-setting features — empowering students to study smarter, not harder. The project blends skills from computer science, UX design, and educational psychology to create a holistic learning tool.

MDP
Project
2025
Campus Life

Clubs & Activities

🔭
VIT Stellar Club
Junior Core Member · Technical & Design Domain
My love for stargazing and the cosmos led me to VIT Stellar Club. As a Junior Core in the Technical and Design domain, I contribute to astronomy outreach events, astrophotography projects, and club design materials — bridging my artistic skills and passion for space.
🎙️
Debate Society
Active Member
A platform where I sharpen my critical thinking, public speaking, and argumentation skills. Debate empowers me to articulate ideas with clarity and confidence, and engage meaningfully with diverse perspectives.
🌱
Juvenile Club
Active Member
Committed to youth development and community service, the Juvenile Club channels my deep interest in social impact into structured, meaningful action — connecting students with the causes that matter most.
Heart & Soul

Social Responsibility

🤍
Celebrating with Those Who Matter

Every year, instead of a conventional birthday celebration, I choose to spend the day at local orphanages — bringing joy, warmth, and a sense of belonging to children who deserve to feel celebrated. For me, happiness multiplies when shared.

🎂

Annual birthday visits to orphanages, creating moments of joy and connection for children — a personal tradition rooted in gratitude and empathy.

🌍
A Belief in Giving Back

Social service is not an obligation for me — it's a value I carry in everything I do. Whether organising community events, participating in social clubs, or simply showing up for those in need, I believe every act of kindness creates a ripple.

✨
Member — Juvenile Club

Actively engaged in youth-led social initiatives at VIT, channelling a genuine passion for community wellbeing.
